name: exclude-pages
summary: exclude specified pages from cave atlas. The list may contain page numbers separated by a comma or dash (for intervals) e.g. 2,4-7,9,23 means, that pages 2, 4, 5, 6, 7, 9 and 23 should be omitted. Only the map pages should be counted. (Set own-pages 0 and title-pages off to get the correct page numbers to be excluded.) Changes of own-pages or title-pages options don't affect page excluding. (A)
